## Problem it solves

<!-- What pain point or limitation does this address?

## Proposed solution

<!-- How should it work? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about?
     Why is your proposed solution better? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, related issues, external references — anything useful. -->
